title: Ngara Rooftop Jazz
description: An evening of live jazz by Nairobi artists overlooking the city.
attendanceInfo: Advance ticket required; the venue is wheelchair accessible.

title: Kibera Community Market
description: Local food, crafts, and clothing from independent neighborhood traders.
attendanceInfo: Free entry; bring a reusable shopping bag.

title: Ngara Family Art Day
description: Drop-in painting and printmaking activities for children and caregivers.
attendanceInfo: Free; children must attend with a caregiver.
